args.query:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT caseid__c, oldvalue__c AS old_agent, newvalue__c AS new_agent
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
), agents_handled AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, old_agent AS agent FROM hist WHERE old_agent IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, new_agent AS agent FROM hist WHERE new_agent IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_agent AS agent, COUNT(*) AS transfers_out
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_agent IS NOT NULL AND (new_agent IS NULL OR new_agent <> old_agent)
  GROUP BY old_agent
)
SELECT a.agent AS agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfers_out,0) AS transfers_out, COUNT(DISTINCT a.caseid) AS handled_cases
FROM agents_handled a
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON a.agent = t.agent
GROUP BY a.agent, t.transfers_out
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.caseid) > 0
ORDER BY transfers_out ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
WITH hist AS (
  SELECT caseid__c, oldvalue__c AS old_agent, newvalue__c AS new_agent
  FROM casehistory__c
  WHERE field__c ILIKE '%owner%' AND createddate >= '2022-04-10' AND createddate <= '2023-04-10'
), agents_handled AS (
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, old_agent AS agent FROM hist WHERE old_agent IS NOT NULL
  UNION
  SELECT caseid__c AS caseid, new_agent AS agent FROM hist WHERE new_agent IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT old_agent AS agent, COUNT(*) AS transfers_out
  FROM hist
  WHERE old_agent IS NOT NULL AND (new_agent IS NULL OR new_agent <> old_agent)
  GROUP BY old_agent
)
SELECT a.agent AS agent_id, COALESCE(t.transfers_out,0) AS transfers_out, COUNT(DISTINCT a.caseid) AS handled_cases
FROM agents_handled a
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON a.agent = t.agent
GROUP BY a.agent, t.transfers_out
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.caseid) > 0
ORDER BY transfers_out ASC, agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
